{
  Edict.Generated.EdictEventTagWritersRegistrar.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

[assembly: global::Edict.Contracts.Routing.EdictEventTagWritersAttribute(typeof(global::Edict.Generated.EdictEventTagWritersRegistrar))]

namespace Edict.Generated
{
    internal static class EdictEventTagWritersRegistrar
    {
        public static void Register(
            global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<
                global::System.Type,
                global::System.Action<
                    global::Edict.Contracts.Events.EdictEvent,
                    global::System.Diagnostics.Activity>> writers)
        {
            writers[typeof(global::Sample.OrderPlacedEvent)] = static (e, a) =>
            {
                var typed = (global::Sample.OrderPlacedEvent)e;
                a.SetTag("edict.sku", typed.Sku);
            };
            writers[typeof(global::Sample.OrderShippedEvent)] = static (e, a) =>
            {
                var typed = (global::Sample.OrderShippedEvent)e;
                a.SetTag("edict.carrier_name", typed.CarrierName);
                a.SetTag("edict.package_count", typed.PackageCount);
            };
        }
    }
}

}
